zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack於1638年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特時，她的父親Pieter van Hasebrouck31歲，母親Niesgen Jacobs Withaer31歲。她於1657年8月30日與Jacobus Kolfs在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年在美國紐約州金斯布盧可林布申維其可享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack于1638年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特时，她的父亲Pieter van Hasebrouck31岁，母亲Niesgen Jacobs Withaer31岁。她于1657年8月30日与Jacobus Kolfs在荷兰-拉藍德萊登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年在美国纽约州金斯布盧可林布申維其可享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack was born in 1638, in North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Pieter van Hasebrouck, was 31 and her mother, Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, was 31. She married Jacobus Kolfs on 30 August 1657, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1694, in Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, New York, United States, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack est née en 1638, à Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Pieter van Hasebrouck, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Jacobus Kolfs le 30 août 1657, à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1694, à Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack 1638 in Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pieter van Hasebrouck 31 und ihre Mutter Niesgen Jacobs Withaer 31. Sie hat am 30. August 1657 in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande Jacobus Kolfs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1694 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack è nata il nel 1638 nel Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Pieter van Hasebrouck, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Jacobus Kolfs il 30 agosto 1657, nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1694, nel Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroackが1638年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントで生まれた時，父Pieter van Hasebrouckは31歳，母Niesgen Jacobs Withaerは31歳であった。1657年8月30日にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンでJacobus Kolfsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州キングズブルークリンブシュウィックで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack(이)가 1638년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pieter van Hasebrouck(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Niesgen Jacobs Withaer(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1657년 8월 30일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 Jacobus Kolfs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 브루클린 부스h윅에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack nasceu em 1638, em Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Pieter van Hasebrouck, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Jacobus Kolfs em 30 de agosto de 1657, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1694, em Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack родилась в 1638 г. в местности нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Pieter van Hasebrouck было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacobus Kolfs 30 августа 1657 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1694 г. в местности бушвикк, бруклин, кингс, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack nació en 1638, en Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Pieter van Hasebrouck, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Niesgen Jacobs Withaer, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Jacobus Kolfs el 30 de agosto de 1657, en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1694, en Bushwick, Brooklyn, Kings, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 56 años.
